insight.headline: Customer API Change
insight.what_changed: The Customer Account API version 2026-10 removes the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the Checkout type subtree. This change affects apps using the Customer Account API to retrieve customer information.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should update their apps to no longer rely on the removed fields. They can use alternative fields or APIs to achieve the same functionality. For example, they can use the OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum to determine the fulfillment status of an order. Additionally, developers should review their app's error handling to ensure it can handle cases where the removed fields are not available. The GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API are affected by this change.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may notice changes in how their customer information is displayed or retrieved by apps. However, this change should not affect the overall functionality of their store.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it ensures that apps are using the most up-to-date and supported APIs, which helps to prevent errors and improve overall app performance.
insight.code_example: query { customer { orders { edges { node { displayFulfillmentStatus } } } } }

also_worth_knowing.text: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices

updates.summary: The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0 with improvements to app updates and GCS bundle upload validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: Shopify has updated its App Store requirements to include honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field has been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more granular market configurations.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis update includes new features such as product variant intents and typed hooks.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping options directly in Markets.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0 with minor changes to the Oxygen Vite plugin.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0 with patch changes to deploy flags and environment variables.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: The GiftCard object in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a lineItem field, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

recap.headline: Shopify updates GraphQL Admin API, Hydrogen, and more

themes.title: API Updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has been updated with new features such as market-driven shipping, draft order deposit fields, and discount application information. Additionally, the Customer Account API has been updated with new fields and deprecations, including the removal of the Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field.

themes.title: Hydrogen and Deployment
themes.detail: Hydrogen has been updated with new features such as deployment to Vercel and improvements to the Oxygen Vite plugin. The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has also been updated with new deploy flags and environment variables.

themes.title: Deprecations and Removals
themes.detail: Several deprecations and removals have been announced, including the deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements, the removal of the Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field, and the deprecation of the discountedUnitPrice field on the DraftOrderLineItem object.

actions.text: Update integrations to use non-cumulative marketing engagements
Update code to use new fields and APIs
